description: Cypress config, e2e specs, and support files should be classified correctly, not flagged as dead code

expectations.subject: cypress/e2e/spec.cy.ts
expectations.note: Cypress e2e spec -- should be classified as test entrypoint

expectations.subject: cypress/support/commands.ts
expectations.note: Cypress support file -- loaded by Cypress convention

expectations.subject: src/unused.ts
expectations.note: File not referenced by any Cypress config -- should be flagged
